--- revoke_on_sequence.sql
REVOKE UPDATE ON SEQUENCE s1 FROM ROLE r1
--- AST
&ast.Revoke{
  Privilege: &ast.PrivilegeOnSequence{
    Privileges: []ast.TablePrivilege{
      &ast.UpdatePrivilege{
        Update: 7,
        Rparen: -1,
      },
    },
    Names: []*ast.Path{
      &ast.Path{
        Idents: []*ast.Ident{
          &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 26,
            NameEnd: 28,
            Name:    "s1",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Roles: []*ast.Ident{
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 39,
      NameEnd: 41,
      Name:    "r1",
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
REVOKE UPDATE ON SEQUENCE s1 FROM ROLE r1
